preservation_claim: The standalone transformation lane must preserve the described workflow behavior while improving product-owned execution discipline.

baseline_measurement.measurement_method: Count the separate proof and record artifacts that previously required hand-authored formatting.

result_measurement.measurement_method: Count the standalone-host proof write needed once a canonical transformation-proof writer exists.

comparison_summary: The proof artifact moves from hand-authored JSON to one canonical product-owned writer while preserving the transformation-proof schema shape.
rollback_verification: Delete the generated transformation proof and transformation record artifacts to return the local bundle to its pre-example state.
